# Contributing to M365 Admin Tool

Thank you for your interest in contributing.

---

## Before You Start

- Open an issue first for significant changes.
- Discuss the proposal before implementing large features.
- Follow existing coding and naming patterns.

---

## Development Guidelines

- PowerShell 5.1 compatible
- WPF/XAML layout must remain responsive
- No hardcoded tenant data
- No secrets in code
- No unnecessary debug output

---

## Pull Requests Must Include

- Clear description of change
- Testing steps
- Screenshots for UI changes
- Version bump (if applicable)

---

## Code Style

- Use descriptive variable names
- Keep functions modular
- Avoid deeply nested logic
- Keep UI minimal and consistent

---

## Testing Checklist

Before submitting:

- [ ] Tiles open correctly
- [ ] Search works
- [ ] Help/About works
- [ ] Tray behavior works
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Compiles correctly with PS2EXE

---

Thank you for helping improve the project.
